title: Workeros — Fix Approval
instructions: Self-verified on the preview. Tick the ones you approve, click Generate review, paste it back to me, and I'll close those issues. Reject = leave unchecked + tell me what's wrong.

items.title: Brain split-view divider now runs FULL HEIGHT to the bottom (your 5x point)
items.root_cause: wrapper used min-h-full (no definite height) so the Collection height:100% couldn't resolve. Collection pages now full-height → divider reaches the bottom. Verified myself.
